description: Rare Greenbelt living at Haven by Boffo! This stunning 4-bed, 4-bath townhome offers over 1,750 sq. ft. of stylish space. The bright main floor features a chef's kitchen with a large island, S/S appliances, and a spacious living room opening to a large balcony. Upstairs, the primary suite boasts a 5-piece ensuite, and two additional upstairs bedrooms, while the lower level offers a private 4th bedroom with full bath & direct access to a fenced yard. Enjoy a side-by-side double garage, modern fixtures throughout and mounted heat pump/AC units for increased comfort. Perfectly located near the PoCo Rec Centre, West Coast Express, and trails. This is the ultimate blend of luxury and convenience!
